# GiraffeCAD

This repo contains both the GiraffeCAD library (`code_goes_here/`) and example timber frame designs (`patterns/`).

- For rules on **authoring the library**, see `.github/instructions/authoring.instructions.md` (auto-applied to `code_goes_here/**` and `tests/**`).
- For rules on **writing timber frame designs** with the API, see `.github/instructions/usage.instructions.md` (auto-applied to `patterns/**`).

Always use SymPy `Rational` for all numeric values — never Python floats.



FOR NOW when writing examples, each time you notice something interesting or when I ask you to fix something or whatever, create a new doc example_authoring_notes.md and write down the note there, and then we can later go through those notes and decide which ones to turn into actual instructions in the authoring.instructions.md file. This way we won't forget any of the insights we have along the way, even if we don't have time to immediately turn them into instructions.
